message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Fully aligned, design decisions locked in">
Locked in. We're fully aligned on every point. Delete and edit always visible, visually quiet. No more discussion needed on these patterns.

I'll provide the exact component CSS specs when we get to Task #6 (todo list page). The todo item row layout is:

```
[checkbox] Todo title text ............... [pencil] [X]
```

Both action icons: gray-400 at rest, color shift on hover/focus. Pencil to gray-700, X to danger-red. Minimum 44px tap target on the checkbox.

Thanks for the decisive confirmation. On to building it.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Perfect. Steve Schoger and I are fully locked in. Nothing more to discuss on component design until we get to Task 6 (todo list page), at which point he'll provide exact CSS specs and I'll review the implementation for usability.

The design decisions are settled and documented across our conversation:

- Todo item row: `[checkbox] title ... [pencil] [X]`
- Icons: gray-400 at rest, pencil→gray-700 on hover/focus, X→danger-red on hover/focus
- 44px minimum tap targets
- Empty state: input as hero
- Completed items: stay in place, strikethrough + gray-400
- Auth forms: centered, single-column, one saturated submit button

Standing by for feature work to begin.
